entries: **A panel that fails to load is no longer pinned to its error screen until restart**: the panel caching added in 0.22.7 stored whatever `build_view` returned — including the `ErrorPanelView` fallback shown when a panel's HTML can't be read — so once a load failed, switching back kept showing the error even after the file was available again. usage now caches only successfully-built web views; a failed build is shown but left uncached and rebuilt on the next switch, so a transient read failure recovers on its own.
